name: FRSSetBitstreamDist
title: FRSSetBitstreamDist
syntax: long FRSSetBitstreamDist (int triggerCondition, char disturbanceSequence[], int disturbanceLength, int delayAfterTrigger, int autoincrement);
description: Generates a bit sequence that is applied to the bus as a disturbance after the trigger is detected. In addition, a delay between the trigger and disturbance can be set. The autoincrement value increases the delay by the specified amount at each additional trigger.
